---
title: "Publications"
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

import bibtexparser
from bibtexparser.bparser import BibTexParser
import html as htmllib
import re

SKIP_FIELDS = {'bibtex_show', 'selected', 'preview', 'arxiv',
               'language', 'ENTRYTYPE', 'ID'}
ARXIV_FIELDS = {'eprint', 'archiveprefix', 'primaryclass'}

def clean_title(t):
    return re.sub(r'[{}]', '', t)

def format_authors(s):
    authors = [a.strip() for a in re.split(r'\s+and\s+', s, flags=re.IGNORECASE)]
    out = []
    for a in authors:
        if ',' in a:
            last, first = a.split(',', 1)
            initials = '. '.join(p[0].upper() for p in first.split() if p) + '.'
            out.append(f'{initials} {last.strip()}')
        else:
            parts = a.split()
            if len(parts) >= 2:
                out.append('. '.join(p[0] for p in parts[:-1]) + f'. {parts[-1]}')
            else:
                out.append(a)
    return ', '.join(out)

def get_href(e):
    doi = e.get('doi', '').strip()
    arxiv = e.get('arxiv', '').strip() or e.get('eprint', '').strip()
    url = e.get('url', '').strip() or e.get('website', '').strip()
    if doi:   return f'https://doi.org/{doi}'
    if arxiv: return f'https://arxiv.org/abs/{arxiv}'
    return url

def venue_html(e):
    etype = e.get('ENTRYTYPE', '').lower()
    if etype == 'phdthesis':
        school = e.get('school', '').strip()
        return f'<em>PhD Thesis</em>, {htmllib.escape(school)}'
    is_preprint = etype == 'misc' or ('eprint' in e and 'journal' not in e)
    if is_preprint:
        return '<em>Preprint</em>'
    j = htmllib.escape(e.get('journal', '').strip())
    vol, num, pages = e.get('volume',''), e.get('number',''), e.get('pages','')
    s = f'<em>{j}</em>'
    if vol:
        s += f', {vol}({num})' if num else f', {vol}'
    if pages:
        s += f', {pages}'
    return s

def links_html(e):
    parts = []
    doi = e.get('doi', '').strip()
    if doi:
        parts.append(f'<a href="https://doi.org/{doi}">DOI</a>')
    arxiv = e.get('arxiv', '').strip() or e.get('eprint', '').strip()
    if arxiv:
        parts.append(f'<a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/{arxiv}">arXiv:{arxiv}</a>')
    url = e.get('url', '').strip() or e.get('website', '').strip()
    if url and not doi and not arxiv:
        parts.append(f'<a href="{url}">Link</a>')
    return ' &middot; '.join(parts)

def make_bibtex(e):
    etype, key = e['ENTRYTYPE'], e['ID']
    is_preprint = etype == 'misc' or ('eprint' in e and 'journal' not in e)
    skip = set(SKIP_FIELDS)
    if not is_preprint:
        skip |= ARXIV_FIELDS
    # convert 'website' → 'url' if no url present
    extra_url = None
    if 'website' in e and 'url' not in e:
        extra_url = e['website'].strip()
    skip.add('website')

    order = ['title', 'author', 'journal', 'school', 'booktitle',
             'volume', 'number', 'pages', 'year', 'month',
             'doi', 'eprint', 'archiveprefix', 'primaryclass', 'url']
    seen = set()
    lines = [f'@{etype}{{{key},']
    for field in order:
        fl = field.lower()
        if fl in skip or fl in seen: continue
        val = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', e.get(field, '').strip())
        if val:
            lines.append(f'  {field:<14} = {{{val}}},')
            seen.add(fl)
    if extra_url and 'url' not in seen:
        lines.append(f'  {"url":<14} = {{{extra_url}}},')
    for field, val in e.items():
        fl = field.lower()
        if fl in skip or fl in seen or fl in ('entrytype', 'id'): continue
        val = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', val.strip())
        if val:
            lines.append(f'  {field:<14} = {{{val}}},')
    lines.append('}')
    return '\n'.join(lines)

def sort_key(e):
    months = dict(jan=1,feb=2,mar=3,apr=4,may=5,jun=6,
                  jul=7,aug=8,sep=9,oct=10,nov=11,dec=12)
    m = e.get('month', 'dec').strip().lower()[:3]
    return (-int(e.get('year', 0)), -months.get(m, 12))

parser = BibTexParser(common_strings=True)
parser.ignore_nonstandard_types = False
with open('papers.bib') as f:
    bib = bibtexparser.load(f, parser)

current_year = None
for e in sorted(bib.entries, key=sort_key):
    year = e.get('year', '?')
    if year != current_year:
        current_year = year
        print(f'<h2>{year}</h2>\n')

    title   = htmllib.escape(clean_title(e.get('title', 'Untitled')))
    href    = get_href(e)
    title_h = f'<a href="{href}">{title}</a>' if href else title
    authors = htmllib.escape(format_authors(e.get('author', '')))
    venue   = venue_html(e)
    links   = links_html(e)
    bib_txt = htmllib.escape(make_bibtex(e))
    sep     = ' &middot; ' if links else ''

    print(f'''\
<div class="pub">
<p><strong>{title_h}</strong><br>
{authors}<br>
{venue}{sep}{links}</p>
<details>
<summary>BibTeX</summary>
<pre><code>{bib_txt}</code></pre>
</details>
</div>
''')
```
